Interface BotChatEventOrBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder
All Known Implementing Classes:
BotChatEvent, BotChatEvent.Builder
@Generated public interface BotChatEventOrBuilder extends com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder

    • getPlainText

      String getPlainText()
      Plain-text rendering of the message with formatting codes stripped.
Stable across Minecraft versions; suitable for pattern matching.
      string plain_text = 2 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The plainText.
